verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I have made You too small in my eyes O Lord, forgive me; And I have believed in a lie That You were unable to help me. But now, O Lord, I see my wrong Heal my heart and show Yourself strong; And in my eyes and with my song /: O Lord, be magnified! :/

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Be magnified, O Lord You are highly exalted; And there is nothing You can't do O Lord, my eyes are on You. Be magnified, O Lord, be magnified.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I have leaned on the wisdom of men O Lord, forgive me; And I have responded to them Instead of Your light and Your mercy. But now, O Lord, I see my wrong Heal my heart and show Yourself strong; And in my eyes with my song /: O Lord, be magnified! :/
